all_shots.narration: The Florida Everglades stretch across millions of acres of slow moving water and dense sawgrass.
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: It is one of the most specialized ecosystems on Earth.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=69.5 sec=6 | Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

all_shots.narration: But right now, a massive predator is moving just beneath the surface.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=101.0 sec=10 | Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

all_shots.narration: And it was never supposed to be here. In the 1980s, Miami established itself as the exotic pet capital of the United Sta

all_shots.narration: importing thousands of foreign reptiles through its ports every single year.

all_shots.narration: Consumers purchased baby Burmese pythons with no understanding of their explosive growth rate.

all_shots.narration: Within months, these snakes reached lengths that made them impossible to keep.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=65.5 sec=53 | Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: When the pythons outgrew their enclosures, overwhelmed owners drove to the nearest swamp and dumped them illegally into
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=80.5 sec=53 | Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: seeding the wetlands with an apex predator.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=63.0 sec=45 | Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

all_shots.narration: Then, in August of 1992, Hurricane Andrew, a Category 5 storm,
all_shots.match_reason: section b-roll

all_shots.narration: tore through South Florida and destroyed a commercial python breeding facility,

all_shots.narration: releasing hundreds of snakes into the Everglades in a single catastrophic night.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=78.5 sec=81 | Hurricane Andrew 1992 and breeding facility breach

all_shots.narration: For years, researchers dismissed sightings as isolated incidents, but by the year 2000,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=53.0 sec=127 | Declining native mammal population chart or infographic

all_shots.narration: scientists confirmed what they feared.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=53.0 sec=172 | Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: The pythons had become a fully established, self-reproducing population in the wild.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=population score=59.0 sec=91 | Established python population and management shift

all_shots.narration: These snakes have no natural predators in Florida.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=71.5 sec=163 | Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: A single female can lay up to 100 eggs per clutch.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=population score=61.5 sec=116 | Python reproduction / egg clutch illustration

all_shots.narration: Their camouflage makes them nearly invisible,

all_shots.narration: and they have systematically consumed the Everglades' native mammals into near extinction.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=ecosystem_collapse score=61.0 sec=175 | Native mammal decline charts and local extinctions

all_shots.narration: Raccoon and opossum populations have collapsed by 99%.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=60.5 sec=125 | Declining native mammal population chart or infographic

all_shots.narration: Marsh rabbits and foxes are now considered locally extinct across most python-invaded areas.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=python_biology score=84.5 sec=137 | Python camouflage, reproduction, and advantages

all_shots.narration: The food web is being dismantled from the bottom up,

all_shots.narration: but the pythons didn't stop at small mammals.

all_shots.narration: They moved up the food chain, successfully hunting and consuming the region's own apex predator,

all_shots.narration: In response, scientists launched the Scout Snake Program.

all_shots.narration: They capture male pythons, surgically implant radio transmitters beneath their scales,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=scout_snake score=66.5 sec=280 | Scout snake radio transmitter program

all_shots.narration: and release them back into the wild. These tracked males then lead biologists directly to hidden breeding aggregations,
all_shots.match_reason: topic=scout_snake score=59.5 sec=265 | Scout snake radio transmitter program

all_shots.narration: clusters of females that would otherwise remain completely undetectable in the dense swamp.
all_shots.match_reason: topic=scout_snake score=34.0 sec=261 | Scout snake radio transmitter program
